div1.entryFree: Speculative, seeing, watching, prying: thoughts s. their unsure hopes relate, but certain issue strokes must arbitrate, Mcb. V, 4, 19 (i. e. the visions of the mind. Perhaps in the modern sense, == notional, theoretical). when light-winged toys of feathered Cupid seel with wanton dulness my s. and officed instruments, Oth. I, 3, 271 (i. e. my eye. Qq speculative and active instruments).
